title: G Drive Integration from OS Desktop App
excerpt: Hi while I’m using Monday from the browsers version it lets me use the “upload or attach links fiels from Google Drive” but when I use the desktop version, it doesn’t. Only the “from computer” appears.  Why is this and h…

posts.author: Rafael (Rafael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi while I’m using Monday from the browsers version it lets me use the “upload or attach links fiels from Google Drive” but when I use the desktop version, it doesn’t. Only the “from computer” appears. Why is this and how can I fix it? See picture for reference.

Thank you

Screen Shot 2020-02-29 at 6.18.54 PM2048×1594 112 KB

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Rafael! Great question - our desktop app does not support any of our cloud-based file integrations (dropbox, google drive, box etc). This is due to the storage of these files and that you’re not web-based when using the desktop app. Hope that helps clarify! Cheers!

posts.author: reinhardts (Reinhardt Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to add it? I mean I’m still connected through the web, so a link must be possible. The Slack (Also a standalone app) integration with Google Drive works fine, so it must be possible.

In the roadmap?

posts.author: melissav-monday.com (Melissa - monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @reinhardts - I’m afraid there is not a way for us to add this functionality at this time, but stay tuned as we are always working to make improvements!

posts.author: Randi1 (Randi Fuchs)
posts.cookedHtml: @melissav-monday.com Checking in here to see if there is any update on this potential feature. My team largely uses the desktop app, so it would be helpful to integrate with Google Drive (at least). Thanks!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Randi1, thanks for following up! At this time we don’t have this potential feature on the road map.

For now I would recommend using Google Chrome to your team if possible, as monday.com is optimized for Google Chrome.

posts.author: RyuHinata (Renaldy)
posts.cookedHtml: Checking in to see if the feature is available

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
@RyuHinata - thanks for checking back. We do not have any plans to add the google drive (or any other integrations that are cloud-based) to the files upload. However, you are able to add a “link column” to your board and paste the google drive link there to be able to open and access it from the desktop app.
Cheers,
Laura
